thesis_one_liner: Subscription creative and marketing software compounder with $22.5B RPO, $23/sh owner cash, and generative-AI monetization embedded in Creative Cloud.
base_irr_label: Lawrence 7-year owner-cash base (stance-context; not capital authority)
key_assumptions: FY2025 free cash flow $23.07 per diluted share anchors owner cash
Growth years 1–5 at 9% and years 6–7 at 6% on subscription RPO conversion
Selling multiple 25 times year-10 cash flow in base case
Digital Media receives 74% revenue-weighted FCF allocation at ~29× capitalization
Firefly AI monetization option base $50/sh incremental to segment engines
open_questions: Net seat additions by individual vs enterprise tier after generative-AI competition
Firefly credit attach rate and ARPU lift versus low-cost AI alternatives
Experience Cloud win rates versus Salesforce and Google marketing stacks
Buyback pace versus stock-based compensation dilution if debt-funded returns continue
